text.headline: Kehan Dong
text.text: Founder, angel investor, and educator building systems around early founders, education, and long-term agency.

text.headline: The Code of Love NGO (2011-2019)
text.text: Founded while in high school in Shanghai. Organized 1,700+ volunteers and delivered educational programs to 6,500+ underprivileged students across five countries.

text.headline: University of California Dropout (2014)
text.text: Attended University of California before dropping out to pursue entrepreneurship full-time.

text.headline: Inner Journeys (2015-2019)
text.text: Started as a small project during junior year. Company was eventually acquired in 2020. Led to Forbes 30 Under 30 recognition. Transformed 1000+ lives over 25+ years.

text.headline: Y Combinator China (Mar 2019 - Nov 2019)
text.text: Joined the founding team as one of the youngest members selected by YC partners. Worked with Sam Altman and the global YC network on investment evaluation and founder support.

text.headline: MiraclePlus (Mar 2019 - Aug 2025)
text.text: Core founding team member. Evaluated 160,000+ applications, participated in 600+ early-stage investments. Built a 7,000+ member intern sourcing engine. Sam Altman noted the intern-based system was more effective than YC's Startup School.

text.headline: Founder & Angel Investor (Sep 2025 - Present)
text.text: Three-month tour across 40 top U.S. universities. Made 30 investments during this period. 650+ total early-stage investments over six years. Delivered 130+ global university talks including every Ivy League and C9 university.
